text:
Once upon an ancient time, there was a land faraway filled with mysterious creatures.

There lived an old owl who knew all secrets;

An old deer adorned with jewels;

And a wise old tree who knew times.

They lived atop a hill shaped like an eagle.

One dreARY day:

The owl heard a sob.

Its mournful voice seemed to echo.

Something terrible.

The old oak sighed.

The ancient owl flew down the mountain.

A girl sat. She had blonde hair.

Her eyes...sorrow.

She sang.

She spoke:

"Oh tree...

Oh owl...

Why did you listen?

I think...I deserve...something better.

You've saved my life...

Perhaps love...?


The old tree nodded.

And the owl...

Suddenly swooped.

The girl whispered;

I think...our hearts.

That night...

Stars wink...

Moonlight.

They danced.

Into woods.

Into secrets.

In quietness...a love blossomed.

They didnhoots?

They didn't know?

But
